name: pg113_spit_normal
description: PG113 — representative of the firmware-fired PG112-PG119 family. After round 2 they all delegate to _SPITTING_FRAME PRIME=1.
diff_explanation: Three intentional cleanups: (1) Round 4's PRZ_SPITTING_START dropped one redundant G92 E0 (E was already at 0 from the prior G92 E0). (2) Round 3 added target_accel=2500 as the PRZ_RUNTIME_STATE default to defuse the ACCEL=0 trap when PG104 hasn't run. (3) Round 2's _SPITTING_FRAME removed two redundant G90 calls (no-op repeats). All three are safety-positive cleanups; functional motion is unchanged.
